jobDuties.title: Product Development & Strategy
jobDuties.description: Oversee end-to-end development and strategic management of digital products (software tools, websites, platforms).

jobDuties.title: Lifecycle & Feature Management
jobDuties.description: Define robust product strategies, strategically prioritize features, and oversee the web development lifecycle.

jobDuties.title: Solution Architecture & Research
jobDuties.description: Architect scalable client-side and server-side solutions and conduct thorough market research.

jobDuties.title: Product Operations
jobDuties.description: Steer day-to-day product operations including QA, content updates, feature enhancements, and bug resolution.

jobDuties.title: Vision & Marketing Alignment
jobDuties.description: Craft compelling long-term and short-term product visions to bolster marketing efforts.

jobDuties.title: Website & Campaign Management
jobDuties.description: Managed corporate websites and executed impactful digital marketing campaigns to drive lead generation.

jobDuties.title: Content & Platform Optimization
jobDuties.description: Maintained and optimized website content, executed targeted SEO and PPC campaigns, and managed diverse lead generation platforms.

jobDuties.title: Integrations & Vendor Liaison
jobDuties.description: Oversaw critical CRM integrations, rigorously evaluated new digital platforms for strategic adoption, and skillfully managed external vendors.

jobDuties.title: Functional Enhancements & Collaboration
jobDuties.description: Significantly enhanced website functionality, SEO, and online reputation, fostering close collaboration with sales, IT, and marketing teams.

jobDuties.title: Marketing-Driven Web Development
jobDuties.description: Focused on marketing-driven web development in a fast-paced startup environment, leveraging WordPress, JavaScript, PHP, and MySQL.

jobDuties.title: Custom Module Development
jobDuties.description: Developed custom WordPress modules, streamlined workflows between marketing and development teams.

jobDuties.title: User Behavior Analysis
jobDuties.description: Utilized Google Analytics, Google Ads, and Tag Manager to analyze user behavior for campaign optimization.

jobDuties.title: QA & Feature Proposal
jobDuties.description: Conducted meticulous manual web testing and proposed innovative features based on reporting metrics and user feedback.

jobDuties.title: E-commerce Platform Management
jobDuties.description: Drove substantial e-commerce growth by optimizing product listings and managing corporate Magento websites and web stores.

jobDuties.title: CRM Strategy Oversight
jobDuties.description: Oversaw comprehensive CRM strategies across Amazon, Magento, and other e-commerce platforms.

jobDuties.title: Data-Driven Performance Analysis
jobDuties.description: Conducted daily data analysis of pricing, inventory, advertising, and shipping performance using Google Analytics and Data Studio.

jobDuties.title: Multi-Channel Sales Management
jobDuties.description: Successfully expanded sales channels to Amazon EU, eBay, Walmart, Newegg, Shopify, and Magento.

jobDuties.title: SEO & Marketing Strategy
jobDuties.description: Developed SEO-focused marketing strategies that boosted product visibility.

jobDuties.title: Financial Performance Reporting
jobDuties.description: Managed financial performance using Google Analytics and Data Studio for reporting, ensuring accurate sales tax and metrics reporting.

jobDuties.title: Customer Experience Enhancement
jobDuties.description: Improved customer experience by efficiently handling inquiries.

jobDuties.title: Quality Assurance Testing
jobDuties.description: Provided technical assistance in testing and modified quality testing processes.

jobDuties.title: Defect Reporting & Tracking
jobDuties.description: Meticulously evaluated and reported software defects via JIRA.

jobDuties.title: Test Plan Coordination
jobDuties.description: Coordinated with development teams to create and execute comprehensive test plans, scenarios, and cases.
